summary: Security-sensitive tool-policy and operator-scope refs were quarantined individually. No duplicate close, merge, or fix PR is safe from this cluster because the canonical representative #49183 and candidate #44484 both involve permission/security-boundary design decisions, and the only unrelated open linked issue #43235 is a separate command-lane isolation tracker.
